name: Venelana Gremory (Netori)
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

During one of her daughter's and her friends visits, Venelana could hear the faint sound of moans coming from her daughter's old room. Wanting to tease Rias and who she thought was Issei, she opened the door abruptly, just to be shocked by what she saw.
